case_title: OPORTUN, INC. VS. MARIA E BARRIOS MARQUINA

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUN-05-2019 - JUDGMENT.
WRIT OF EXECUTION ISSUED TO SANTA CLARA COUNTY FILED BY PLAINTIFF OPORTUN, INC. AS TO DEFENDANT MARQUINA, MARIA E BARRIOS
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,423.63 FILED BY OPORTUN, INC. AS TO DEFENDANT MARQUINA, MARIA E BARRIOS ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUN-05-2019 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - FEE FOR SERVICE $ 50.00 - SERVED APR-18-2019, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT MARQUINA, MARIA E BARRIOS
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS.) FILED BY PLAINTIFF OPORTUN, INC.

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JUN-05-2019 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JUN-05-2019 BY A. JAMES ROBERTSON II. PLAINTIFF OPORTUN INC IS PRESENT LUPE ACEVEDO LEGAL COLLECTION SPECIALIST. DEFENDANT MARIA E. BARRIOS MARQUINA IS NOT PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: A. JAMES ROBERTSON II; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(506)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF OPORTUN, INC. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MARQUINA, MARIA E BARRIOS $1,423.63 PRINCIPAL, $80.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,503.63 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
WRIT RETURNED WRIT OF EXECUTION ISSUED TO SANTA CLARA COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, UNSATISFIED AS TO DEFENDANT MARQUINA, MARIA E BARRIOS
